stories.article: FIFA announced that the winners of the 2026 World Cup will receive championship rings similar to those awarded in American sports. Ahead of the tournament, Lionel Messi and Tom Brady discussed photos of young player Lamine Yamal, describing them as "prophetic." Experts have also provided odds and predictions for the final match between Argentina and Spain.

headlines.title: FIFA World Cup Title winners to receive US-style championship rings
headlines.lede: One side will feature the World Cup trophy, while the other will carry details specific to the champions.

stories.article: Evacuation orders remain in effect in British Columbia as wildfires continue to spread across the region. The fires have also caused deteriorating air quality, prompting health warnings in parts of the United States. Authorities are monitoring the situation closely and advising residents to follow safety guidelines.

headlines.title: Evacuation orders continue as B.C. wildfires surge
headlines.lede: The number of active wildfires in the province has more than doubled to about 70, the BC Wildfire Service says

stories.article: Christopher Nolan's upcoming film "The Odyssey" has announced its cast, featuring a range of actors in key roles. The Hollywood Reporter provided a detailed guide outlining who is playing each character in the epic production. The film is expected to bring a new adaptation of the classic story to the screen. Further details about the cast and production are available through official announcements.

headlines.title: Who's Playing Who in Christopher Nolan's Epic
headlines.lede: A look at all the actors in Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' film and what characters they are playing, explained.

stories.article: Tensions escalated as the United States and Iran exchanged strikes near the Strait of Hormuz, with Kuwait experiencing infrastructure damage amid the conflict. Meanwhile, Ukrainian drones targeted an oil depot and logistics hubs in the Moscow region. In other news, David Crowley plans to reenter the Wisconsin governor’s race following the lieutenant governor’s withdrawal.

stories.article: Sir Garry Sobers, widely regarded as one of cricket's greatest all-rounders, has died at the age of 89. In cricket news, New Zealand has taken a 2-1 lead in their One Day International series against the West Indies. The series continues with upcoming matches scheduled between the two teams.

headlines.title: Garry Sobers, cricket’s greatest all-rounder, dies at 89
headlines.lede: ST JOHN’S: Sir Garry Sobers, arguably the greatest all-rounder of all time, has died aged 89, West Indies Cricket...

headlines.lede: PROVIDENCE (Guyana): New Zealand beat West Indies by six wickets in the third One-day International to take a 2-1...

stories.article: Two former Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents faced assault charges related to an incident in Maine, but the cases against them are reportedly weakening. One of the agents, who fatally shot a man during the incident, has been described by his ex-wife as having racist beliefs and violent tendencies. The investigation and legal proceedings are ongoing.

headlines.title: They Were Charged With Assaulting ICE Agents. The Cases Are Crumbling. - The New York Times
headlines.lede: They Were Charged With Assaulting ICE Agents. The Cases Are Crumbling.  The New York Times
